name: @tt23xrstudio/senri_ffi
description: Unified FFI library for [KossJS Runtime](github.com/KossJS), Node.js Runtime, and Bun Runtime
author: TT23XR Studio

scripts.prebuild: npx tsx scripts/generate-worker-code.ts && npx tsx scripts/generate-worker-code.ts --bun
scripts.test:kossjs: tsc && esbuild src/__tests__/kossjs-entry.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=SenRiFFI --platform=node --external:koffi --external:@koromix/* --external:./async/* --outfile=dist/kossjs-bundle.js --log-level=error && vitest run src/__tests__/kossjs-ffi.test.ts
scripts.test:all: vitest run src/__tests__/node-ffi.test.ts src/__tests__/integration.test.ts src/__tests__/normalize.test.ts src/__tests__/pointer.test.ts
